zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey Cornwallis於1275年出生時，他的父親Sir Richard de Cornwall , Lord of Thunnock23歲，母親Joan FitzAlan16歲。他於1304年與Margaret Mortimer在英國史洛普爾布福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他埋葬在英國史洛普爾布福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey Cornwallis于1275年出生时，他的父亲Sir Richard de Cornwall , Lord of Thunnock23岁，母亲Joan FitzAlan16岁。他于1304年与Margaret Mortimer在英国史洛普爾布福德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他埋葬在英国史洛普爾布福德。

nameMeanings.name: Cornwallis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: regional name for someone from Cornwall, a Normanized form of Middle English Cornwalish. Compare Cornwall .

variants.name: Cornwall
meanings: habitational name from the county of Cornwall, which is named with the Old English tribal name Cornwealas. This is from Kernow (the term that the Cornish used to refer to themselves, a word of uncertain etymology, perhaps connected with a Celtic element meaning ‘horn, headland’), + Old English wealas ‘strangers, foreigners’, the term used by the Anglo-Saxons for British-speaking people.

variants.name: Cornish
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name for someone from the county of Cornwall, from Middle English Cornish, Cornysh formed on the analogy of English, which was usually Normanized as Corneys. Not surprisingly, the surname is common in adjacent Devon, but it is also established as far afield as Suffolk and London.

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey Cornwallis was born in 1275, his father, Sir Richard de Cornwall , Lord of Thunnock, was 23 and his mother, Joan FitzAlan, was 16. He married Margaret Mortimer in 1304, in Burford, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He was buried in Burford, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey Cornwallis est né en 1275, son père, Sir Richard de Cornwall , Lord of Thunnock, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Joan FitzAlan, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Mortimer en 1304, à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Ilenterré à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey Cornwallis 1275 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard de Cornwall , Lord of Thunnock 23 und seine Mutter Joan FitzAlan 16. Er hat 1304 in Burford, Shropshire, England Margaret Mortimer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er wurde in Burford, Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey Cornwallis è nato il nel 1275, il suo padre, Sir Richard de Cornwall , Lord of Thunnock, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Joan FitzAlan, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Mortimer nel 1304, nel Burford, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Fu sepolto a Burford, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Cornwallisが1275年に生まれた時，父Sir Richard de Cornwall , Lord of Thunnockは23歳，母Joan FitzAlanは16歳であった。1304年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォードでMargaret Mortimerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Cornwallis(이)가 1275년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard de Cornwall , Lord of Thunnock(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan FitzAlan(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1304년 영국 슈럽실르 버퍼드에서 Margaret Mortimer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 슈럽실르 버퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey Cornwallis nasceu em 1275, seu pai, Sir Richard de Cornwall , Lord of Thunnock, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Joan FitzAlan, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Mortimer em 1304, em Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele foi sepultado em Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey Cornwallis родился в 1275 г., его отцу по имени Sir Richard de Cornwall , Lord of Thunnock было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Joan FitzAlan, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Mortimer в 1304 г. в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он был похоронен в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffrey Cornwallis nació en 1275, su papá, Sir Richard de Cornwall , Lord of Thunnock, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Joan FitzAlan, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Margaret Mortimer en 1304, en Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Fue sepultado en Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
